When The Effects Are On, Plok Floats In The Air And You Can Move Him Around (Turn Them Off To Let Him Drop)
When You Jump Around, You Collect Tons Of Shells Out Of Nowhere (It Messes The Graphics Up And You May Get Stuck)
Weird Jump (You Jump As High As The Spin Jump)
When You Shoot All Of Plok's Limbs, He Doesn't Bounce When You Move To The Right Or Left
Logs Roll In The Opposite Direction
